# Security Policy

The main application source code has been removed from the `main`
branch of the repository, because this is intended to maintain
the appearance of a game surface. However, the full source code,
including the external webhook, can be found on `develop`.

## Supported Versions

This repository does not expose any distributable packages, and it is
not intended for download.
Therefore, the security policy relates only to the current HEAD of `main`
and `develop`.


## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you identify any security or privacy-related vulnerabilities,
please report it by opening a [private vulnerability report](https://github.com/hesreallyhim/github-minesweeper/security/advisories/new).
The maintainer will acknowledge the report and coordinate a fix and
disclosure timeline as appropriate.
